label: 第46話
source_locator: 単行本6巻 目次 p.47
summary_short: 生徒たちは狗巻の呪言で花御を足止めしながら帳の外を目指すが、次々に追い詰められる。真希が特級呪具「游雲」を手に加勢する。
summary_full: 楽巌寺は電気ギターを構え、組屋との戦闘に入る。花御から逃げる伏黒・加茂・狗巻は、呪言で攻撃を止め、加茂が百斂から穿血を放つ。連続使用で狗巻の喉が限界に達し、加茂も倒される。狗巻は先輩として伏黒を逃がすため強い呪言で花御を吹き飛ばすが、自身も戦闘不能になる。そこへ真希が到着し、三輪の刀は花御に通じず折れる。伏黒は保管していた特級呪具・游雲を真希へ渡し、二人で反撃を始める。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: The jujutsu students are faced with the unprecedented threat that is 花御 . As their strategy to keep the curse at bay slowly crumbles, 恵 and the others must face the special grade 呪霊 head-on.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: The Kyoto Principal readies himself to fight the 呪詛師. 歌姫 and Principal 楽巌寺 pass through the curtain cast around the school. The former notices the presence of special grade curses. 鞣造 surprises her as he walks down the stairs to greet them. He demands to know where 五条悟 is and 楽巌寺 notices that 鞣造 is a pretty skilled 呪詛師. 鞣造 realizes that he was tricked by the other curse users and 楽巌寺 volunteers to deal with him. He asks 歌姫 to go on ahead but 鞣造 protests because he would rather make something from a woman's corpse than an old man's. Insulted, 楽巌寺 takes out his electric guitar and prepares for battle. 鞣造 isn't intimidated and demands the rotting geezer come back after he fixes his hollow bones. 棘 fails to stop 花御 from countering 鵺. Elsewhere, 恵 , Noritoshi , and 棘 flee from a mass of wood branches created by 花御. 棘 drinks cough syrup to soothe his throat as 花御 emerges from the branches and attacks with wood balls that have sharp wooden spears protrude from them suddenly. 棘 is able to stop them in time with his cursed speech and Noritoshi follows up with 百斂: 穿血, which fires a speeding blood bullet at 花御's face. This time, Noritoshi is able to hurt 花御, surprising 恵. 棘 continues to use cough syrup to heal his throat while Noritoshi mulls over their strategy. 棘 is able to stop 花御 and his attacks, allowing 恵 and Noritoshi to gain distance before attacking. However, they cannot keep up this strategy for long as his cursed speech is becoming less effective. The priority is to find 東堂 or any other jujutsu sorcerer to help them. 花御 beats Noritoshi into the ground. 鵺 circles around the building as 恵's group runs across the roof. He promises 鵺 that 棘 will stop 花御 and sends 鵺 into battle. Unfortunately, 棘's throat suddenly gives out due to 花御's superior power at that moment. 花御 stabs 鵺 and immediately pummels Noritoshi into the ground. Another trio of wooden spheres threaten to piece Noritoshi but 恵 grabs him out of the way in time. 真希 enters the battle with a powerful new weapon! As 花御 approaches 恵, he prepares to summon another 式神 while 鵺 fades away. 棘 stops 恵 and takes responsibility as his senpai. He confronts 花御 directly and without fear, commands 花御 to Blast Away! The strength of 棘's cursed speech puts him over his limit and he collapses, however, it successfully hits 花御 with enough concussive force to blast him across the roof. While 花御 recovers from the impact, he notices 真希 's presence behind him and claims he can't be cut with such a sword. 真希 slashes 花御 with 三輪's sword but it breaks. 恵 quickly follows up by slashing the left branch within 七海's eye socket, which 恵 has deduced to be his weakness. 花御 claims that 恵's sword is strong but the jujutsu student responds by revealing something even better. He gives 真希 a powerful cursed tool which she claims doesn't feel quite right.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 漏瑚 真人 花御 庵歌姫 楽巌寺嘉伸 組屋鞣造 狗巻棘 伏黒恵 加茂憲紀 禪院真希
candidate_evidence.battles_events_raw_text: 京都姉妹校交流会 恵, 棘 & Noritoshi vs. 花御 (終了) 伏黒恵 & 禪院真希 vs. 花御 (開始)
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 伏黒恵の術式 十種影法術 術式 鵺 加茂憲紀の術式 赤血操術 百斂 穿血 百斂 穿血 狗巻棘の術式 呪言「止まれ」／「ぶっ飛べ」 呪具 恵's Black Sword 游雲

key_events_verified_phase3: 楽巌寺と組屋が戦闘に入る
加茂が穿血で花御を攻撃する
狗巻が限界を超える呪言で花御を吹き飛ばす
真希が游雲を受け取る
verification_notes_phase3: 集英社公式の単行本目次・巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第三段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
